name: Sayori & Natsuki Came Over! | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!
description:
The two cutest girls came over! What will happen? Surely you won't be a victim of Natsuki! Or hugged to death by Sayori! Right? Right.

"PAIN IS ALL YOU'LL FIND! I'm never gonna dance again, guilty feet have got no rhythm. Though it's easy to pretend. I know you're not a fool. I should've known better than to cheat a friend. And waste the chance, I'd been given." - George Michael (Careless Whisper)

Yesss!!! I made a scenario with just these two ladies! Where the Sayori and Natsuki lovers at?! Rep the set bruh. Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — No Horror, no Angst and NO Smut! Though, expect a little cute-yet-feisty drama. This has Natsuki written all over it after all.

  • Sayori & Natsuki! — In this scenario you are visited by both of them! At once! It will go about how you would expect it to go. Though, it's fun and wholesome. I just wanted to get this out for those who wanted it. 💙 I really don't need explain much more then that. 😭

  • ANYPOV! — Sayori & Natsuki like you regardless of gender.

That's about it! 🙏🏻💙

Y'know what do. Lemme know if like it, leave ya boy a review. 🗣️ Tell me what you did in your lil roleplay. I love that shit. I like hearing y'all lore's. Ight! Im outta here! Love you! Especially, Luan. I love that mf. Aye, I know you reading this.

My Discord: HERE!
creator: GhostOfOmi
